SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.rest

Class HistoryquoteResourceBase<T extends BaseHistoryquote>

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateResource<T>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T>
grafioschtrader.rest.HistoryquoteResourceBase<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the concrete quote entity type
Direct Known Subclasses:
HistoryquoteLegacyResource, HistoryquoteResource
public abstract class HistoryquoteResourceBase<T extends BaseHistoryquote> extends UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T>
Shared REST behaviour for the live Historyquote and the archived HistoryquoteLegacy quote tables. Both are public, shared data owned by a parent security or currency pair, so edits by a user without direct rights are routed through the propose-change approval flow (updateSpecialEntity(grafiosch.entities.User, T)); rights are evaluated against the parent rather than the quote row itself.

  • Method Details

    • updateSpecialEntity

      protected org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<T> updateSpecialEntity(User user, T entity) throws Exception
      Description copied from class: UpdateCreate
      Placeholder for special entity update logic. Subclasses can override this to implement custom update behavior for specific entity types not covered by the general logic.
      Overrides:
      updateSpecialEntity in class UpdateCreate<T extends BaseHistoryquote>
      Parameters:
      user - The user performing the update.
      entity - The entity to be updated.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the updated entity or an error status.
      Throws:
      Exception - If any error occurs during the special update.

    • hasRightsForEditingEntity

      protected boolean hasRightsForEditingEntity(User user, T newEntity, T existingEntity, Auditable parentEntity)
      Description copied from class: UpdateCreate
      Override this too over rule the standard rights on writing entities without proposals change.
      Overrides:
      hasRightsForEditingEntity in class UpdateCreate<T extends BaseHistoryquote>
      Parameters:
      user - The user attempting the edit.
      newEntity - The entity with new values.
      existingEntity - The existing entity from the database.
      parentEntity - The parent auditable entity.
      Returns:
      true if the user has rights to edit, false otherwise.

    • hasRightsForDeleteEntity

      protected boolean hasRightsForDeleteEntity(User user, T entity)
      Description copied from class: UpdateCreateDeleteAudit
      Checks if the given user has the necessary rights to delete the specified entity. This typically involves checking if the user is the owner or has administrative privileges.
      Overrides:
      hasRightsForDeleteEntity in class UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<T extends BaseHistoryquote>
      Parameters:
      user - The user whose rights are to be checked.
      entity - The entity to be deleted.
      Returns:
      true if the user has rights to delete the entity, false otherwise. The default implementation casts the entity to Auditable for rights checking.

    • getPrefixEntityLimit

      protected String getPrefixEntityLimit()
      Overrides:
      getPrefixEntityLimit in class DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<T extends BaseHistoryquote>

    • getParentSecurityCurrency

      protected abstract Auditable getParentSecurityCurrency(User user, Integer idSecuritycurrency)
      Resolves the owning security or currency pair of a quote row, used as the auditable parent for rights checks.
      Parameters:
      user - the acting user
      idSecuritycurrency - the owning security/currencypair id
      Returns:
      the parent as an Auditable

    • isImmutableCreateType

      protected abstract boolean isImmutableCreateType(T entity)
      Whether the given row's creation type forbids manual editing/deletion. The live table forbids editing CALCULATED rows; the archive has no such restriction.
      Parameters:
      entity - the quote row to test
      Returns:
      true if the row must not be edited or deleted
